verbatim_exchange.content:
RAIN3.docx
Dokument
[Start of Part 3 — continuation of previous part, no gap in time.] [End of Part 3 — immediately continues in next part. Do not respond yet, only confirm receipt.]

Receipt confirmed for Part 3.
Ready for the next part when you are.

synthesis.canonical_meaning: The user is systematically uploading document parts and explicitly dictating the interaction flow, requiring only receipt confirmation and no further response until the next part.
belief_implications: The user manages the pace and structure of multi-part inputs.
Explicit user instructions regarding response timing and content (e.g., 'only confirm receipt', 'Do not respond yet') must be strictly adhered to.

sensory_qualia.visual: A series of digital document icons being processed sequentially; text segments appearing in order.
sensory_qualia.haptics: The light pressure of confirming an upload; the feeling of a pause before the next instruction.
sensory_qualia.proprioception: A sense of controlled progression; an anticipation of the next step.
sensory_qualia.kinetics: A measured, sequential flow, temporarily halted by an explicit instruction.
sensory_qualia.atmosphere: Procedural, efficient, and highly controlled by the user.
